title: copaiba coriacea
intro: Copaiba coriacea is a species of evergreen tree in the family Burseraceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The tree's bark and resin contain alpha-pinene, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable medicinal resource. The health benefits of Copaiba coriacea include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, soothe skin conditions, and support respiratory health. Copaiba coriacea is commonly prepared as an essential oil or tincture, and is used in herbal medicine to promote overall wellness and alleviate various health issues.
